qa_pairs.question: What is the primary purpose of this document?
qa_pairs.answer: This page records changes to job scheduling policies which might affect the behaviour of job submission commands.

qa_pairs.question: Which job submission commands are potentially affected by the policy changes documented here?
qa_pairs.answer: The `sbatch`, `salloc`, and `srun` commands might be affected.

qa_pairs.question: When were RAC 2026 accounts activated for the Fir cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: RAC 2026 accounts were activated for the Fir cluster on 2026-04-06.

qa_pairs.question: On what date did RAC 2026 accounts become active for the Narval and Rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: RAC 2026 accounts became active for the Narval and Rorqual clusters on 2026-04-07.

qa_pairs.question: When did sub-allocations become available on the Nibi cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Sub-allocations became available on the Nibi cluster on 2026-04-06.

qa_pairs.question: What is the status of updates for CPU jobs as of May 1, 2026, according to this document?
qa_pairs.answer: There are no updates for CPU jobs as of May 1, 2026.

qa_pairs.question: What new requirement applies to all GPU requests on clusters like Fir and Nibi as of April 6, 2026?
qa_pairs.answer: All GPU requests must specify a GPU model or an instance model.

qa_pairs.question: What is the policy regarding the maximum number of Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) instances that can be requested at a time?
qa_pairs.answer: Only one MIG instance may be requested at a time.

qa_pairs.question: When did the policy requiring specification of a GPU model or instance model for GPU requests become effective on the Rorqual cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: This policy became effective on the Rorqual cluster on 2026-04-17.

qa_pairs.question: For which cluster are the new GPU policies, such as specifying a GPU model and limiting MIG instances, noted as "coming soon"?
qa_pairs.answer: The Narval cluster is noted as "coming soon" for these GPU policies.

qa_pairs.question: What are the two main policy changes concerning GPU jobs listed in this document?
qa_pairs.answer: All GPU requests must specify a GPU model or instance model, and only one Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) instance may be requested at a time.

qa_pairs.question: What specific date marks the availability of sub-allocations on the Rorqual cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Sub-allocations became available on the Rorqual cluster on 2026-04-07.

qa_pairs.question: When did the restriction of requesting only one MIG instance at a time become effective on the Fir cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: This restriction became effective on the Fir cluster on 2026-04-06.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of accounts were activated on April 6, 2026, for the Fir and Nibi clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: RAC 2026 accounts were activated for the Fir and Nibi clusters.
